prospects.fit_reason: F&I directors and desk managers are RouteOne's core daily users, making this audience a direct line to the decision-makers who champion or switch their F&I platform.
prospects.pitch_angle: Category-exclusive 'F&I Tech Spotlight' weekly slot — sole F&I platform sponsor for 90 days, reinforcing brand presence at the point of daily workflow decisions.

prospects.category: F&I product manufacturer (VSC, GAP, ancillary products)
prospects.fit_reason: F&I directors who read daily newsletters are actively evaluating product menus and provider relationships, exactly the moment Protective wants to be visible.
prospects.pitch_angle: Dedicated 'Product of the Month' feature with a brief case-study format showing dealer PVR lift — positions Protective as a thought-leader, not just an ad.

prospects.fit_reason: Compliance leads and floor GMs face escalating federal and state labor compliance burdens, and a compliance-focused tool vendor gets premium relevance with this subscriber persona.
prospects.pitch_angle: Sponsor the recurring 'Compliance Corner' section — category-exclusive placement adjacent to compliance editorial, framing Compli as the go-to solution in context.

prospects.fit_reason: Used-car managers and desk managers are the daily operators of CRM tools, and a newsletter reaching them with workflow tips is a credibility-building channel DealerSocket actively seeks.
prospects.pitch_angle: Weekly 'Tool of the Day' rotation spot — short-form tip tied to a DealerSocket feature, bridging editorial value with soft product exposure to active CRM evaluators.

prospects.fit_reason: Used-car managers and GMs managing lot inventory are prime buyers of GPS-based lot management and vehicle intelligence tools that reduce shrink and improve turn.
prospects.pitch_angle: Sponsor an 'Inventory Intel' weekly feature — position Spireon's data insights as the analytical backbone behind smarter used-car decisions, with a demo CTA.

prospects.fit_reason: Desk managers and F&I directors evaluating digital-to-showroom pipeline tools are AutoFi's ideal prospects, and a newsletter they read for operational tips is a high-trust channel.
prospects.pitch_angle: Category-exclusive digital retailing sponsorship for a 60-day run — banner plus a dedicated 'Desk Ops Deep Dive' advertorial exploring F&I workflow integration.

prospects.fit_reason: Floor GMs and operations leads managing service loaner fleets face real cost and liability exposure — Dealerware solves a specific, under-served pain point this audience owns.
prospects.pitch_angle: 'Tool of the Day' rotation featuring a loaner fleet ROI angle — short editorial showing cost-per-loaner math, with Dealerware as the sponsored solution.

prospects.fit_reason: F&I directors and compliance leads are directly responsible for contract accuracy and regulatory form updates — Reynolds forms are a daily-use product for this exact persona.
prospects.pitch_angle: Sponsor a quarterly 'Forms & Compliance Update' digest issue — Reynolds branded, summarizing new regulatory form requirements with a direct CTA to their forms catalog.

prospects.category: AI-powered income & document verification for F&I
prospects.fit_reason: F&I directors managing stipulation risk and funding delays are the precise buyer persona Informed.IQ targets, and a newsletter position gives them warm access during the evaluation phase.
prospects.pitch_angle: Category-exclusive 'F&I Friction Fix' sponsored slot — frame Informed.IQ as the solution to the #1 funding delay problem, with a benchmark data hook to drive clicks.

prospects.fit_reason: Used-car managers responsible for aging inventory and turn rates are Lotlinx's core customers, and an ops-focused newsletter reaching them daily is a direct acquisition channel.
prospects.pitch_angle: Sponsor the 'Used Car Desk' weekly section — Lotlinx-branded inventory aging tip plus a soft CTA to their VIN-level demo, reinforcing brand during used-car strategy reading.

prospects.fit_reason: Used-car managers who source and wholesale vehicles are ACV's transacting audience — reaching them in a professional ops newsletter builds preference before the next vehicle acquisition decision.
prospects.pitch_angle: Category-exclusive wholesale marketplace sponsorship — 'Wholesale Market Pulse' weekly data snippet sponsored by ACV, blending market intelligence with brand visibility.

prospects.category: F&I ancillary product manufacturer (GAP, tire & wheel, appearance)
prospects.fit_reason: F&I directors actively managing their ancillary product mix and per-copy revenue are Safe-Guard's direct buyers, and a high-trust daily newsletter is a credible channel to reach them at scale.
prospects.pitch_angle: Dedicated F&I product advertorial once per month — co-authored 'PVR Builder' case study format, sponsored by Safe-Guard, demonstrating a specific product's attach-rate impact.
